title: Correlated States in Quantum Dot Clusters Coupled to a Common Superconductor
summary: We study an effective model of regular quantum dot clusters coupled to a common superconductor. By applying a canonical transformation, we map the system onto a particle-number-conserving representation, making it directly accessible to standard fermionic neural-network quantum-state variational Monte Carlo methods. We show that the superconducting gap closes at a particular high-symmetry point, which, in finite non-interacting systems, corresponds to crossings between singlet ground states of different character. Combining exact methods, density matrix renormalization group, and neural quantum-state variational Monte Carlo calculations, we identify three distinct interacting regimes: a trivial superconducting singlet phase, a strongly correlated regime connected to an effective Heisenberg model, and a critical intermediate regime with qualitatively different behavior in one and two dimensions. In one-dimensional systems, the intermediate regime exhibits a sequence of singlet-doublet transitions and becomes gapless in the thermodynamic limit even for finite Coulomb interaction. In two-dimensional clusters, we find robust triplet ground states. Furthermore, our results demonstrate that relatively standard fermionic neural quantum states provide an efficient approach for correlated superconducting nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究耦合到超导体的量子点团簇，通过规范变换和神经量子态变分蒙特卡洛等方法，发现超导能隙在高对称点闭合，并识别出三种不同的相互作用区域：平庸超导单态、与有效Heisenberg模型相关的强关联区、以及在一维和二维中表现不同的临界中间区。
AI.motivation: 研究规则量子点团簇耦合到公共超导体的有效模型，探索超导能隙闭合的机制以及不同相互作用区域中的量子相变行为。
AI.method: 应用规范变换将系统映射到粒子数守恒表示，结合精确方法、密度矩阵重正化群(DMRG)和神经量子态变分蒙特卡洛(NQS-VMC)方法进行计算分析。
AI.result: 发现超导能隙在高对称点闭合，识别出三种不同相互作用区域；在一维系统中中间区出现单态-双重态转变序列且在热力学极限下无能隙；在二维团簇中发现稳健的三重态基态。
AI.conclusion: 标准费米子神经量子态方法能够有效处理关联超导纳米结构问题。

title: SPLIT-PINN: Separable Probability Learning Technique via Physics-Informed Neural Networks for High-Dimensional Probabilistic Modeling
summary: We present a probabilistic modeling framework for incorporating small-scale spatial heterogeneity into macroscopic descriptions of material behavior for polycrystalline metallic materials. Spatially heterogeneous material state fields are represented using probability density functions (PDFs), providing a principled statistical description of microstructural variability and state evolution across different computational polycrystalline realizations. The framework is built on the inverse identification of a probabilistic transport model, formulated as a Liouville equation with an unknown drift term. To enable accurate, stable, and interpretable inference of this drift field in high-dimensional, transport-dominated settings, we develop a Separable Probability Learning Technique via Physics-Informed Neural Networks (SPLIT-PINN). This method incorporates a marginal-correction drift decomposition, orthogonality constraints, and residual-based adaptive training to enhance well-posedness, numerical stability, and physical consistency without imposing restrictive parametric assumptions. Using SPLIT-PINN, the drift field governing the temporal evolution of joint state PDFs is inferred directly from data. After benchmark validation, the framework is applied to physical computational datasets describing the evolution of polycrystalline microstructural states, including von Mises stress, dislocation density, and equivalent plastic strain rate. The learned Liouville model, trained on a single dataset, is subsequently used in forward predictions of the temporal evolution of joint and marginal PDFs for multiple unseen polycrystal realizations. Quantitative comparisons with reference PDFs demonstrate that the proposed framework yields accurate and robust probabilistic predictions and generalizes effectively across datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于概率建模的框架，通过SPLIT-PINN方法从数据中学习Liouville方程的漂移项，实现对多晶金属材料微观结构异质性的宏观概率描述，并在多个未见数据集上展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统宏观材料描述难以捕捉小尺度空间异质性，而微观结构变异对材料行为有重要影响，亟需一种能在高维、传输主导场景下进行概率建模的框架。
AI.method: 构建基于概率密度函数（PDF）的表示框架，通过逆辨识Liouville方程（含未知漂移项）的漂移场；提出SPLIT-PINN方法，包括边缘校正漂移分解、正交约束和残差自适应训练，以增强数值稳定性和物理一致性。
AI.result: 在基准验证后，应用于多晶微观结构数据集（von Mises应力、位错密度、等效塑性应变率），训练后的Liouville模型可准确预测多个未见多晶实现的联合和边缘PDF分布。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供准确鲁棒的概率预测，并有效跨数据集泛化，为微观结构统计描述提供新范式。

title: Moiré enabled spin pumping and preservation in MoSe2/WS2 heterobilayers
summary: The spin degree of freedom is a fundamental quantum mechanical attribute with implications spanning from magnetism to quantum computing. Consequently, the relaxation of spin states for extended, Bloch electrons in solids has been studied for decades as it defines many of their properties and applications. We show that moiré patterns in layered materials can extend spin relaxation times by two orders of magnitude to 1 millisecond and beyond. This is achieved by suppressing spin mixing for electrons in 2D semiconductor heterostructures, particularly in the MoSe2/WS2 system, as we elucidate both experimentally and theoretically. The extended longitudinal lifetime facilitates spin alignment over 50% using only nanowatt levels of optical power. Our findings highlight the potential of moiré engineering for future quantum sensing and information processing.

AI.tldr: 本文发现MoSe2/WS2等二维半导体异质结中的莫尔图案可将自旋弛豫时间延长两个数量级（达1毫秒以上），仅需纳瓦级光功率即可实现超50%的自旋极化，为量子传感与信息处理提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 自旋自由度是量子力学基本属性，对磁学和量子计算至关重要。然而体相材料中Bloch电子的自旋弛豫时间有限，限制了自旋相关应用的发展。
AI.method: 利用二维半导体异质结（MoSe2/WS2）中的莫尔图案，通过抑制电子自旋混合来延长自旋寿命；结合实验与理论计算进行验证。
AI.result: 自旋弛豫时间延长了两个数量级，达到1毫秒以上；仅需纳瓦级光功率即可实现超过50%的自旋极化。
AI.conclusion: 莫尔工程在延长自旋寿命方面效果显著，有望推动量子传感与量子信息处理技术的发展。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Symbolic Regression through Bayesian Support Selection
summary: The Sure Independence Screening and Sparsifying Operator (SISSO) framework is a powerful symbolic-regression method for extracting compact and interpretable descriptors from large nonlinear feature spaces. However, standard SISSO is deterministic: it returns a single descriptor and point prediction, without quantifying uncertainty in descriptor selection, regression coefficients, or predictions. Here we introduce a probabilistic extension in which the sure independence screening (SIS) stage is kept deterministic to preserve scalability, while the sparsifying operator (SO) stage is reformulated as Bayesian inference over the SIS-screened support space. The resulting deterministic-SIS/Bayesian-SO framework yields posterior probabilities for competing descriptor supports, feature-inclusion probabilities, Bayesian-model-averaged predictions, and predictive credible intervals, while recovering the deterministic SO descriptor of standard SISSO in the maximum-a-posteriori limit. Applied to an $X_2YZ$ Heusler-alloy magnetic-moment dataset, the approach gives modest improvements in five-fold cross-validation RMSE and near-nominal empirical coverage of the 95$\%$ predictive intervals. More importantly, the posterior exposes competing, physically related symbolic descriptor families that would appear artificially unique in a deterministic analysis. These results suggest that deterministic-SIS/Bayesian-SO can be used as an uncertainty-aware diagnostic extension of SISSO: a tool for assessing descriptor confidence, stability, and non-uniqueness in small-data materials regression problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种概率扩展的SISSO框架（确定性SIS/贝叶斯SO），在保持可扩展性的同时，通过贝叶斯推断对描述符选择、回归系数和预测进行不确定性量化，并在Heusler合金数据集中展现了竞争性描述符族的存在，作为SISSO的不确定性感知诊断扩展。
AI.motivation: 标准SISSO是确定性的，只能返回单一描述符和点预测，无法量化描述符选择、回归系数和预测中的不确定性，这在材料科学小数据回归问题中可能导致对描述符唯一性的错误认知。
AI.method: 保持SIS阶段确定性以保证可扩展性，将SO阶段重构为SIS筛选支持空间上的贝叶斯推断，从而获得描述符支持的后验概率、特征包含概率、贝叶斯模型平均预测和预测可信区间。
AI.result: 在X₂YZ Heusler合金磁矩数据集上，五折交叉验证RMSE略有改善，95%预测区间覆盖接近名义水平；更重要的是，后验分布揭示了在确定性分析中会被视为唯一的、实际上相互竞争的物理相关符号描述符族。
AI.conclusion: 确定性SIS/贝叶斯SO可作为SISSO的不确定性感知诊断扩展，用于评估描述符的置信度、稳定性和非唯一性，特别适用于小数据材料回归问题。

title: Cooper quartets and fractional vortices in frustrated Josephson junction dice arrays
summary: Superconductivity mediated by Cooper quartets of charge 4e is a phenomenon of key importance for both the understanding of certain exotic superconductors and the engineering of quantum memories protected at the hardware level by topological order. Josephson junction arrays in the shape of the dice lattice constitute one of the main candidates for the realization of this phase of matter. Here, we analyze numerical signatures of the emergence of this exotic phase when superconducting dice arrays are frustrated by inserting one third of a flux quantum per rhombic plaquette. We adopt simulations of relaxation dynamics to study the critical current of such devices and analyse the Fourier decomposition of their bulk supercurrents. A further characterization of these systems at finite temperature is obtained through Monte Carlo techniques and two-dimensional infinite tensor networks. Our results indicate that the observed peaks of the critical current and temperature at frustration 1/3 correspond to a superconductor-insulator phase transition compatible with the deconfinement of half-vortices, while the low-temperature correlation functions of the model confirm the onset of a 4e superconducting phase mediated by Cooper quartets. We finally address the effects of Josephson energy and flux disorder typical of experimental arrays, and comment on the role of charging energies in the corresponding two-dimensional quantum model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究在1/3通量量子每菱形格子条件下，骰子晶格约瑟夫森结阵列中电荷4e超导相（Cooper四重态介导）的出现，发现临界电流和温度的峰值对应超导体-绝缘体相变，低温关联函数确认了4e超导相，并讨论了实际实验中的无序和充电能量影响。
AI.motivation: 电荷4e超导（Cooper四重态介导）对理解奇异超导体和构建拓扑保护的量子存储器至关重要，而骰子晶格约瑟夫森结阵列是实现该物相的主要候选体系，亟需数值验证其存在性。
AI.method: 采用弛豫动力学模拟研究临界电流，分析体超电流的傅里叶分解；通过蒙特卡洛技术和二维无限张量网络对有限温度体系进行表征。
AI.result: 在1/3通量偏置下，临界电流和温度出现峰值，对应超导体-绝缘体相变且与半涡旋退禁闭相容；低温关联函数确认了4e超导相（Cooper四重态介导）的建立。
AI.conclusion: 骰子晶格约瑟夫森结阵列在1/3通量偏置下可稳定实现电荷4e超导相，该相由Cooper四重态介导；实际实验中的约瑟夫森能和无序效应不会破坏该相，而充电能量在对应的二维量子模型中起重要作用。

title: Quaternion Dirac--Coulomb--Breit Integral Transformation for Relativistic Four-Component Correlated Electronic Structure Theory
summary: High-accuracy correlated four-component relativistic electronic structure methods are typically formulated in terms of integrals over molecular orbital (MO). Consequently, an efficient and scalable strategy is required to deal with the complexity of transforming relativistic two-electron integrals from the atomic orbital (AO) to the MO basis. The transformation bottleneck is particularly acute for approaches that include Breit interaction integrals, whose computational and memory demands further exacerbate the transformation cost. To overcome this challenge, we develop a quaternion-based, AO-driven direct integral transformation scheme. The method operates on scalar AO integrals and combines quaternion density-based contractions with direct Cauchy-Schwarz screening to systematically exploit integral locality. As a result, the proposed framework substantially lowers the practical computational scaling and provides an efficient, memory-conscious, and highly parallelizable pathway for the routine inclusion of relativistic Dirac-Coulomb-Breit integrals in large-scale four-component correlated calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于四元数的、原子轨道驱动的直接积分变换方案，用于高效处理相对论四分量电子结构计算中的Dirac-Coulomb-Breit双电子积分变换问题，通过利用积分局域性和Cauchy-Schwarz筛序大幅降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 高精度四分量相对论电子结构方法中，双电子积分从原子轨道(AO)到分子轨道(MO)的变换是计算瓶颈，尤其是包含Breit相互作用的积分，其计算和内存需求极高，亟需高效的变换策略。
AI.method: 开发了基于四元数表示的、AO驱动的直接积分变换方案。该方法对标量AO积分进行操作，结合四元数密度基收缩和直接Cauchy-Schwarz筛序，系统性地利用积分局域性。
AI.result: 该框架显著降低了实际计算标度，提供了一条高效、内存友好且高度可并行的路径，使得Dirac-Coulomb-Breit积分能够常规地用于大规模四分量相关计算。
AI.conclusion: 提出的四元数AO驱动直接积分变换方案有效克服了相对论四分量计算中Breit积分变换的瓶颈，为大规模高精度相对论电子结构计算提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Reconstructing Unobservable Temperature Fields via Simulation-Aided Intelligent Sensing
comment: Presented at IEEE International Instrumentation and Measurement Technology Conference (I2MTC), Nancy, France, 2026
summary: Real-time monitoring of the temperature distribution within components and sub-structures is a challenging topic in many systems due to restrictions on feasible sensor locations. While machine learning (ML) proves a versatile tool in many applications, its adoption for high-resolution thermal monitoring is hindered by the availability of high-quality datasets for training. In this work, we propose a novel approach for generating datasets for industrial applications based on randomized physics-based simulations. We demonstrate the approach in a proof-of-concept hardware setup: A neural network (NN) trained only on such a synthetic dataset, is used to reconstruct the internal temperature field from sparse sensors embedded in the hardware. The NN-based reconstructions do not only outperform Kriging in robustness but also enable real-time inference, making the method suitable for online monitoring of otherwise unobservable thermal states.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于随机物理仿真的合成数据生成方法，用于训练神经网络，实现从稀疏传感器实时重建内部温度场，在鲁棒性和实时性上优于克里金法。
AI.motivation: 许多系统因传感器位置受限难以实时监测内部温度分布，而机器学习因缺乏高质量训练数据难以应用。
AI.method: 基于随机物理仿真生成合成数据集，训练神经网络，利用硬件中稀疏传感器的数据重建内部温度场。
AI.result: 仅用合成数据集训练的神经网络在温度场重建中，鲁棒性优于克里金法，且能实现实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于在线监测原本不可观测的热状态，为工业热监测提供了可行的数据驱动解决方案。

title: Breaking the width-scaling limit in high-performance atomically thin 2D nanoribbon transistors
summary: State-of-the-art transistors have been successfully scaled the gate lengths and channel thicknesses down to 5 nm for high-performance and energy-efficient information processing. However, reducing channel width below 40-50 nm remains a bottleneck, as dangling bonds, edge disorder, and lateral depletion suppress drive current and degrade device performance. Here, we break this width-scaling wall using ultra-scaled two-dimensional semiconductor (2DSC) nanoribbon transistors down to 15 nm. In contrast to the conventional scaling rule of degradation of current density upon width scaling, our atomically-thin monolayer and bilayer molybdenum disulfide nanoribbon transistors exhibit enhancement of on-current density of up to 230% and 170%,respectively, followed by a saturation for the narrowest channels down to 15 nm. The ultra-narrow nanoribbon transistors maintain the highest on/off ratios reported so far for similar device dimensions, with improved mobility and threshold-voltage stability, indicating reduced edge scattering and depletion with a stronger electrostatic control. These findings lead to a breakthrough in width scaling rules using 2DSC nanoribbons with enhanced performance at narrower channel widths, which is promising for the ultimate scaling of transistors.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了基于二维半导体（2DSC）二硫化钼的超窄纳米带晶体管，成功将沟道宽度缩至15 nm，打破了传统宽度缩放瓶颈。与常规器件随宽度减小电流密度下降不同，单层和双层MoS₂纳米带晶体管的导通电流密度分别提升230%和170%，并保持了高开关比、改进的迁移率和阈值电压稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统晶体管在栅长和沟道厚度上已成功缩至5 nm，但沟道宽度缩放仍受限于40-50 nm，主要由于悬挂键、边缘无序和横向耗尽效应导致驱动电流下降和性能退化。本文旨在突破这一宽度缩放瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用超薄二维半导体（2DSC）MoS₂纳米带，制备单层和双层结构的超窄沟道晶体管，将沟道宽度缩至15 nm，并通过电学性能表征（导通电流密度、开关比、迁移率、阈值电压稳定性）评估器件表现。
AI.result: 单层和双层MoS₂纳米带晶体管在宽度缩至15 nm时，导通电流密度分别提升230%和170%，随后趋于饱和；器件保持了同类尺寸中最高的开关比，迁移率和阈值电压稳定性得到改善，表明边缘散射和耗尽效应减弱，静电控制增强。
AI.conclusion: 利用2DSC纳米带实现了宽度缩放规则的突破——在更窄的沟道宽度下性能反而提升，这为晶体管的终极缩放提供了有前景的路径。

title: Floquet Nonadiabatic Dynamics for Light-Matter Interactions: Recent Advances and Emerging Opportunities
summary: Light-matter interactions provide versatile routes for probing and controlling chemical reactivity, charge transport, and material properties. Time-periodic external fields can reshape electronic states and open new dynamical pathways beyond the field-free Born-Oppenheimer (BO) picture. Floquet nonadiabatic dynamics has consequently emerged as an important framework for describing coupled electron-nuclear dynamics under periodic driving. In this Perspective, we first discuss recent developments in Floquet nonadiabatic dynamics methods for closed and open quantum systems. We then highlight how this framework provides mechanistic insights into electron transfer at molecule-metal interfaces, quantum transport in molecular junctions, carrier dynamics in crystalline solids, and multicolor Floquet engineering. Finally, we outline key conceptual and computational challenges that must be addressed to transform Floquet nonadiabatic dynamics from model-based demonstrations into predictive, first-principles simulations of realistic light-driven processes.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Floquet非绝热动力学在周期性光驱动下描述电子-核耦合运动的最新进展，涵盖闭系统和开系统方法、在分子-金属界面电子转移、分子结量子输运、晶体载流子动力学及多色Floquet工程中的应用，并指出了从模型演示走向第一性原理预测模拟的关键挑战。
AI.motivation: 光-物质相互作用为探测和控制化学反应、电荷输运及材料性质提供了多样化途径。时间周期性外场能重塑电子态并开辟超越静态Born-Oppenheimer图像的新动力学路径，因此Floquet非绝热动力学成为描述周期性驱动下电子-核耦合运动的重要框架。
AI.method: 综述了闭系统和开量子系统的Floquet非绝热动力学方法，涵盖其在分子-金属界面、分子结、晶体固体及多色Floquet工程中的机制性应用。
AI.result: 该框架为电子转移、量子输运、载流子动力学及多色工程提供了机理层面的新见解。
AI.conclusion: 必须解决关键的概念性和计算性挑战，才能将Floquet非绝热动力学从基于模型的演示转变为对真实光驱动过程具有预测能力的第一性原理模拟。

title: Probing pairing symmetries through quasiparticle interference in chiral Bloch bands
summary: Recent experiments in van der Waals multi-layer systems have demonstrated that superconductivity can emerge from symmetry-reduced, chiral normal states. We here provide a theory for quasiparticle interference (QPI) of superconductors with chiral Bloch bands. Our analysis reveals how the non-trivial quantum geometry of the Bloch states crucially affects the interference pattern even in the normal state, inducing significant sublattice dependence. In the superconducting state, the behavior becomes more complex due to the interplay of the quantum geometry of the Bogoliubov quasiparticles with the momentum-dependent phase of the order parameter. We reveal how the spatial dependence of the local spectral function around impurities can be used to distinguish between different candidate pairing states, both with zero and finite center-of-mass momentum. Our work thus provides guidance to interpreting QPI patterns in materials with chiral bands, which may be useful when probing the rich physics of pairing in such systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对手性布洛赫带超导体的准粒子干涉(QPI)理论，揭示了布洛赫态的量子几何对干涉图案的关键影响，并展示了如何通过局域谱函数的空间依赖区分不同配对态。
AI.motivation: 近期实验在范德华多层体系中观测到超导可以从对称性破缺的手性正常态涌现，但对手性布洛赫带超导体的QPI图案缺乏理论理解，亟需建立相关理论以指导实验解释。
AI.method: 通过理论分析QPI，系统研究了正常态和超导态下量子几何对干涉图案的影响，考虑了布洛赫态的非平凡量子几何、博戈留波夫准粒子的量子几何以及序参量的动量依赖相位。
AI.result: 正常态中量子几何会诱导显著的子格依赖；超导态中量子几何与序参量相位的相互作用使行为更复杂；局域谱函数的空间依赖可用于区分不同候选配对态（包括零质心动量和有限质心动量）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为解释手性带材料中的QPI图案提供了理论指导，有助于探测这类体系中丰富的配对物理。

title: DeltaDiff: Training-Free, Physics-Guided Machine Learning for Predicting Mutant Protein Structures
summary: Determining mutant protein structures is critical for understanding the mechanistic roles of mutations in biochemical processes. However, experimental characterization and conventional theoretical modeling are often expensive and time-consuming. Recent advances in machine learning provide new opportunities to efficiently predict protein structures from primary sequences. Nevertheless, applying these models to proteins with single-site or few-site mutations remains challenging because mutant sequences are often highly similar to their wild-type counterparts. Here, we introduce DeltaDiff, a physics-guided inference framework for mutant-structure generation that incorporates mutation-aware physical guidance into a baseline diffusion model. We evaluate DeltaDiff on three representative systems: Chignolin T8P, Novispirin G-10, and BBL D162N. All three examples involve nonlocal structural changes, making accurate mutant-structure prediction challenging. DeltaDiff captures key mutation-induced conformational changes without requiring retraining or fine-tuning of the baseline model. These results establish a foundation for efficient mutant-structure prediction at a fraction of the cost of conventional methods, facilitating rational mutant design.

AI.tldr: DeltaDiff是一个物理引导的推理框架，能在不重新训练模型的情况下，高效预测单点/少量突变蛋白的结构，捕捉非局部构象变化。
AI.motivation: 突变蛋白结构解析对理解突变机制至关重要，但实验和传统理论方法昂贵耗时；现有机器学习模型难以处理与野生型高度相似的突变序列。
AI.method: 提出DeltaDiff框架，将突变感知的物理引导融入基线扩散模型中，无需重新训练或微调即可生成突变蛋白结构。
AI.result: 在Chignolin T8P、Novispirin G-10和BBL D162N三个系统上验证，成功捕捉突变诱导的非局部构象变化。
AI.conclusion: DeltaDiff为高效低成本的突变蛋白结构预测奠定基础，有助于理性突变设计。

title: Variational low-energy subspaces for chemically accurate excited states
summary: Accurate electronic excited states are essential for photochemistry, spectroscopy and non-adiabatic molecular dynamics, but high-level calculations often scale steeply and require prior knowledge of the target state's character or symmetry. Here we show that variational excited-state optimization can be reformulated as an iterated ground-state-like problem for a low-energy subspace of the electronic Hamiltonian. Applying this variational principle to non-orthogonal Slater determinants leads to EXIDOS, an automatic method for excited state calculations controlled only by the number of states and determinants per state. EXIDOS optimizes multiple excited states simultaneously, without explicit orthogonality constraints or imposed spin and point-group symmetries. Benchmarks against FCI and state-of-the-art quantum chemistry methods show chemical accuracy for a multitude of states in N$_2$ and CO, charge-transfer states in HCl, Rydberg states in NH$_3$, double excitations and extended potential-energy curves in C$_2$, and avoided crossings and conical intersections in ethylene. These results establish EXIDOS as a low-scaling, fully variational route to chemically accurate excited states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EXIDOS方法，将变分激发态优化重新表述为迭代基态问题，利用非正交Slater行列式同时优化多个激发态，无需显式正交约束或对称性先验知识。在多种分子体系上实现了化学精度的激发态计算。
AI.motivation: 高精度激发态计算对光化学、光谱学至关重要，但传统方法计算成本高且需要目标态的先验知识（如对称性）。作者旨在开发一种低标度、全变分且无需先验知识的自动激发态计算方法。
AI.method: 将变分激发态优化重构为低能子空间的迭代基态问题，应用于非正交Slater行列式，实现同时对多个激发态的优化，无需显式正交性约束或自旋/点群对称性施加。
AI.result: 在N₂、CO、HCl、NH₃、C₂和乙烯等体系中，对包括电荷转移态、里德堡态、双激发态、势能面交叉在内的多种激发态均达到了化学精度。
AI.conclusion: EXIDOS是一种低标度、全变分的激发态计算方法，能够自动获得化学精度的激发态，具有广泛适用性。

title: Electron-Ion Path Integral Monte Carlo with Hard Core
summary: We performed numerical (restricted) path integral Monte Carlo experiments on metallic Hydrogen from first principles. We study a quantum two component plasma where one component is made of pointwise particles of negative unitary charge and the other is made of charged hard spheres of positive unitary charge. We study both the additive mixture and a nonadditive mixture where we only keep a hard core between unlike species. We specialize to the case of the electron-proton plasma with a 1:1 ratios between the molar fraction of the two species. We measured thermodynamic and structural properties of the plasma. From an analysis of the structure we see a transition from a metallic Hydrogen phase, to a molecular Hydrogen phase as the temperature is lowered. As expected at high density the correlations are diminished.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理路径积分蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了电子-质子等离子体从金属氢到分子氢的相变过程，发现随温度降低和密度变化，体系结构发生显著转变。
AI.motivation: 旨在从第一性原理出发，数值研究金属氢的量子效应，特别是电子-质子双组分等离子体在不同温度和密度下的结构相变行为。
AI.method: 采用（受限）路径积分蒙特卡洛方法，构建量子双组分等离子体模型，其中电子为点状负单位电荷粒子，质子为带电硬球正单位电荷粒子；研究了可加性混合和非可加性混合（仅异种粒子间保留硬核）两种情况。
AI.result: 观测到随温度降低，体系从金属氢相转变为分子氢相；高密度下粒子间相关性显著减弱。
AI.conclusion: 路径积分蒙特卡洛模拟成功再现了金属氢到分子氢的相变，证实了温度和密度对氢等离子体结构的关键调控作用。

title: Curvature-Controlled Infrared Regularization of Crystalline Membranes
summary: We show that negative Gaussian curvature regularizes the infrared sector of crystalline membranes. In a covariant formulation of embedded elasticity, the Green strain contains a symmetry-required linear coupling between the normal phonon and extrinsic curvature. Integrating out the in-plane phonons converts this coupling into a finite quadratic contribution to the inverse flexural response. Anomalous roughening is thereby replaced by curvature-controlled saturation, and the mechanism survives on minimal hyperbolic patches. Hyperbolic geometry preempts anomalous elasticity before the flat infrared regime is reached, implying the absence of a crumpling phase. The same Gaussian-order coupling admits sound propagation in the infrared.

AI.tldr: 负高斯曲率通过调节声子与曲率的耦合，使晶体膜在红外区域从反常粗糙化转变为曲率控制的饱和，避免了皱缩相，并允许声波传播。
AI.motivation: 研究负高斯曲率如何影响晶体膜在红外区域的弹性行为，特别是能否抑制反常粗糙化和皱缩相。
AI.method: 采用协变弹性理论框架，引入Green应变中法向声子与外禀曲率的线性耦合项；通过积分掉面内声子，推导出对弯曲响应逆传播函数的有限二次贡献。
AI.result: 负高斯曲率使反常粗糙化被曲率控制的饱和所取代；在最小双曲补丁上机制依然存在；双曲几何在到达平坦红外区域前即阻止了反常弹性，从而避免了皱缩相；相同的耦合允许红外声波传播。
AI.conclusion: 负高斯曲率能够正则化晶体膜的红外行为，抑制皱缩相，为理解弯曲几何中的膜弹性提供新视角。

title: Why Fe doping kills photoluminescence in CsPbCl$_3$ but not in CsPbBr$_3$: Role of midgap Fe 3$d$ states and electron-phonon coupling
summary: Understanding the impact of transition-metal doping on the optoelectronic properties of halide perovskite nanocrystals is essential for their rational design in photonic applications. We establish the microscopic origin of photoluminescence (PL) quenching in Fe-doped CsPbCl$_3$ using spin-polarized density functional theory calculations. The emergence of Fe 3$d$ midgap states creates efficient electron-trapping centres that drive nonradiative recombination, accounting for the reduced PL intensity. Extending this analysis to Fe-doped CsPbX$_3$ (X = Cl, Br), we show experimentally that although PL intensity is suppressed in both systems relative to their pristine counterparts, their high-doping behaviour diverges: CsPbCl$_3$ becomes completely non-emissive, whereas CsPbBr$_3$ retains a finite, saturated PL intensity. Despite this contrast, electronic structure calculations reveal nearly identical midgap states in both materials, indicating that electronic effects alone cannot explain the distinct PL responses. Phonon calculations likewise fail to capture this difference. In contrast, electron-phonon coupling calculations based on the deformation potential approach reveal significantly stronger coupling in Fe-doped CsPbCl$_3$, enabling efficient dissipation of electronic excitation energy into lattice vibrations and leading to complete PL quenching. These results identify electron-phonon coupling as the key factor governing halide-dependent PL quenching and provide a unified microscopic framework for dopant-induced nonradiative processes in halide perovskites.

AI.tldr: 通过自旋极化DFT计算与实验结合，揭示了Fe掺杂CsPbX₃中电子-声子耦合是决定卤素依赖PL猝灭的关键因素，而非单纯的电子态效应。
AI.motivation: 理解过渡金属掺杂对卤化物钙钛矿纳米晶光电性质的影响，对于其在光子学应用中的理性设计至关重要。
AI.method: 采用自旋极化密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，结合实验PL测量与变形势方法计算电子-声子耦合强度。
AI.result: Fe掺杂引入的3d中间隙态是电子陷阱中心；尽管两种材料（Cl, Br）具有几乎相同的电子结构，但Fe:CsPbCl₃的电子-声子耦合远强于Fe:CsPbBr₃，导致前者PL完全猝灭，后者保持饱和PL强度。
AI.conclusion: 电子-声子耦合是决定卤素依赖PL猝灭的关键因素，提供了掺杂诱导非辐射过程的统一微观框架。

title: Tunable Resonator Integrated Magnetometry
summary: The quantum-technology revolution is reshaping computing, sensing, and communication. In magnetometry, recent advances leverage precise control of spin qubits and color centers in solid-state crystals for mesoscopic-scale sensing. Yet at very low temperatures, superconducting sensing technology remains unrivaled because of its non-invasiveness and higher sensitivity. Here we describe a class of superconducting sensors that offers low loss and quantum non-demolition measurement characteristics. We designed and fabricated a superconducting flux-tunable resonator (tRes) in a superconducting chip foundry and matured it to a level that combines the speed of an inductor-capacitor circuit with the flux sensitivity of a superconducting quantum interference device (SQUID) to perform magnetometry at milli-kelvin temperature to investigate targets. We introduce its fundamental functionality readily at MHz magnetic sampling rate, showcase two measurement modalities, and investigate three circuits with gradually increasing complexity to extract target-specific information. The combination of high sensitivity and fast readout characteristics make tRes an attractive and versatile magnetometer.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种在超导芯片代工厂设计制造的通量可调超导谐振器（tRes），它结合了LC电路的速度和SQUID的磁通灵敏度，能在毫开尔文温度下进行快速、高灵敏度的磁力测量，并展示了三种不同复杂度的电路用于提取目标信息。
AI.motivation: 量子技术革命正在重塑计算、传感和通信。在磁力测量中，虽然自旋量子比特和固态晶体中的色心实现了介观尺度传感，但在极低温下，超导传感技术因其非侵入性和更高灵敏度而无可匹敌。本工作旨在开发一种兼具低损耗和量子非破坏测量特性的新型超导传感器。
AI.method: 在超导芯片代工厂设计并制造了一种超导通量可调谐振器（tRes），将其成熟化到结合LC电路的速度和SQUID的磁通灵敏度的水平，用于在毫开尔文温度下进行磁力测量。展示了MHz磁采样率下的基本功能，提出了两种测量模式，并研究了三种复杂度递增的电路。
AI.result: 成功实现了tRes在MHz磁采样率下的基本功能，展示了两种测量模态，并通过三种复杂度递增的电路提取了目标特定信息。该传感器兼具高灵敏度和快速读出特性。
AI.conclusion: tRes结合了高灵敏度和快速读出能力，是一种有吸引力的多功能磁力计，在极低温磁力测量领域具有应用潜力。

title: Curvature-driven revival of charge density waves in non-Euclidean space
summary: Strongly correlated quantum states, such as charge density waves (CDWs), are exquisitely sensitive to Fermi surface topology and lattice symmetry, and are typically quenched by heavy carrier doping. In two-dimensional (2D) systems, however, macroscopic geometric curvature emerges as a novel structural degree of freedom to modulate microscopic quantum coherence. This raises a compelling physical question: can non-Euclidean geometric deformations compete with extreme electronic perturbations to reshape, or even revive, a quenched macroscopic quantum order? Here, by constructing monolayer TiSe$_2$-NbSe$_2$ heterostructure on a BLG/SiC substrate for the first time, we report the curvature-driven revival of a frustrated charge order in a non-Euclidean space. Low-temperature angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) reveals a massive interfacial charge transfer, which destroys the global Fermi surface nesting and completely suppresses the long-range CDW order in Euclidean flat regions. Strikingly, high-resolution scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) reveals that a novel, non-linear CDW state miraculously survives, remaining strictly localized within morphologically distorted, non-Euclidean nanoscale curved regions. Atomistic simulations unravel the structural origin of this phenomenon, demonstrating that interfacial twist and lattice mismatch spontaneously generate a corrugated superlattice.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在BLG/SiC衬底上构建单层TiSe₂-NbSe₂异质结构，首次实验证明了非欧几何曲率可以驱动被淬灭的电荷序在弯曲空间中复兴，即使在巨量界面电荷转移破坏了全局费米面嵌套并抑制了长程CDW的平坦区域，纳米级弯曲区域仍能奇迹般地存活非线性的CDW态。
AI.motivation: 探索非欧几何变形（宏观几何曲率）作为一种新的结构自由度，是否能够与极端电子扰动竞争，重塑甚至复兴被淬灭的宏观量子有序态。
AI.method: 在BLG/SiC衬底上构建单层TiSe₂-NbSe₂异质结构，结合低温角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）和扫描隧道显微镜（STM）进行实验表征，并辅以原子尺度模拟揭示结构起源。
AI.result: ARPES显示平坦区域发生巨量界面电荷转移，破坏了全局费米面嵌套并完全抑制了长程CDW序；但STM揭示在形态扭曲的非欧弯曲纳米区域，一种新颖的非线性CDW态奇迹般地存活；原子模拟表明界面扭转和晶格失配自发产生波纹状超晶格。
AI.conclusion: 非欧几何曲率可以作为一种有效的调控手段，在强电子扰动下复兴被淬灭的量子有序态，为利用几何自由度操控强关联量子相提供了全新途径。

title: Monitored chaotic scattering
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures; contribution for the special issue of J.Math.Phys. on "Random Matrices, Random Graphs, and Quantum Chaos: In Honor of Uzy Smilansky's 85th Birthday"
summary: We extend the random-matrix theory of chaotic scattering to quantum dots whose dynamics is monitored by time-resolved measurements. Starting from a scattering matrix drawn from a circular ensemble, we construct the corresponding ensemble of Kraus operators for the monitored evolution of the many-body density matrix. In the single-particle sector the sum over measurement outcomes can be carried out algebraically, giving a discrete-time quantum master equation for the transferred charge. We solve this equation numerically and compare the resulting charge-transfer statistics with closed-form random-matrix predictions. The latter rely on an equipartition rule for monitored particles, which we formulate as a conjecture and test against the master equation.

AI.tldr: 本文将随机矩阵理论从混沌散射扩展到时间分辨测量的量子点监控动力学，通过Kraus算符系综构建多体密度矩阵的监控演化，并在单粒子扇区导出离散时间量子主方程，与随机矩阵预测进行对比验证。
AI.motivation: 将随机矩阵理论从传统的混沌散射扩展到受监控的量子点动力学，建立监控测量下的理论框架，并验证一种关于监控粒子均分规则的猜想。
AI.method: 从圆形系综的散射矩阵出发构造Kraus算符系综；在单粒子扇区通过代数求和消去测量结果，导出离散时间量子主方程；数值求解主方程并与封闭形式的随机矩阵预测进行对比。
AI.result: 数值求解了电荷转移统计的离散时间量子主方程，并与随机矩阵预测进行了比较。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个关于监控粒子均分规则的猜想，并通过与主方程的比较对其进行了验证。

title: Topography-based navigation in a millikelvin scanning tunneling microscope using binary-encoded position markers
summary: We present a compact millikelvin scanning tunneling microscope (STM) operating at 270mK with topographic navigation to micron-scale targets. Two piezoelectric low-temperature nanopositioners extend the accessible sample area, while a multi-stage copper powder and capillary filter scheme preserves millikelvin energy resolution, verified by BCS spectroscopy on aluminium thin films. A lithographically fabricated binary-encoded gold pattern encodes unique 16-bit coordinates in 4x4 pixels of 200nm$\times$200nm each. We demonstrate absolute positioning across a 350$\times$350$\mathrmμ$m$^2$ area from a single STM scan. Requiring only a single lithography step and no hardware modifications to existing STM setups, the navigation system provides a versatile platform for scanning tunneling spectroscopy of nanoflakes and nanoscale devices.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种在270mK低温下工作的紧凑型扫描隧道显微镜（STM），它利用压电纳米定位器和二进制编码的金图案，实现了在350×350μm²区域内从单次STM扫描到微米级目标的绝对定位，且无需硬件改造。
AI.motivation: 现有的低温STM在微米级目标（如纳米片、纳米器件）的定位和导航方面存在困难，需要一种简单、通用且不牺牲能量分辨率的导航方案。
AI.method: 采用两个压电低温纳米定位器扩展样品扫描区域；通过多级铜粉和毛细管滤波器保持毫开尔文能量分辨率；在衬底上制作二进制编码的金图案（4×4像素，每像素200nm×200nm），编码16位坐标，通过STM扫描识别图案实现绝对定位。
AI.result: 在270mK下成功实现350×350μm²区域的绝对定位；通过铝薄膜的BCS能谱验证了毫开尔文能量分辨率未受影响。
AI.conclusion: 该导航系统仅需单次光刻步骤且无需修改现有STM硬件，为纳米片和纳米器件的扫描隧道谱学研究提供了一个通用且高效的平台。

title: Machine learning via artificial neural networks coupled with density functional theory and experiments for thermodynamic optimization of high-entropy alloys for hydrogen storage at room temperature
summary: High-entropy alloys (HEAs) have received considerable attention for hydrogen storage because of their compositional flexibility; however, designing HEAs with optimal thermodynamics is critical. This study employs machine learning via artificial neural networks (ANN) and density functional theory (DFT) to design a novel AB-type TixNb2-xVCrMnFe (x = 0.5-2.0) high-entropy system for hydrogen storage at ambient temperature (A: Ti, V and Nb, and B: Cr, Mn and Fe). Both ANN and DFT predict that the hydride formation enthalpy decreases to negative values with increasing the titanium content. Two alloys with x > 1.5 are predicted to achieve enthalpies within the -25 to -39 kJ/mol range, making them appropriate for room-temperature hydrogen storage. Experiments demonstrate good agreement with the enthalpy predictions, with the Ti-rich alloys showing reversible hydrogen storage with fast kinetics at room temperature. These results provide a framework for reliable use of data analysis and ab initio calculations to explore high-entropy hydrides as hydrogen storage materials.

AI.tldr: 本研究结合机器学习（ANN）和密度泛函理论（DFT）设计了TixNb2-xVCrMnFe高熵合金用于室温储氢，发现Ti含量增加使氢化物形成焓降低至负值，Ti-rich合金实现了可逆储氢和快速动力学，预测与实验吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 高熵合金因其成分灵活性在储氢领域备受关注，但如何设计具有最优热力学的HEAs是关键挑战，现有方法难以高效筛选成分。
AI.method: 采用人工神经网络（ANN）和密度泛函理论（DFT）相结合的方法，设计AB型TixNb2-xVCrMnFe（x=0.5-2.0）高熵体系，预测氢化物形成焓，并通过实验验证。
AI.result: ANN和DFT均预测Ti含量增加使氢化物形成焓向负值移动；当x>1.5时，形成焓在-25至-39 kJ/mol范围内，适合室温储氢；Ti-rich合金实验表现出可逆储氢和快速动力学，与预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 证明了数据分析和第一性原理计算相结合可以可靠地探索高熵氢化物储氢材料，为高熵储氢合金的理性设计提供了有效框架。

title: Variational approach to determine the properties of dislocations at finite deformation
summary:
A generalised version of the continuum theory of curved dislocations describing the spatial and temporal evolution of the fields: statistically stored dislocation density, geometrically necessary dislocation density, and curvature has recently been proposed. The dynamics of the system are derived from a scalar functional of the relevant fields that cannot increase during the evolution of the system. However, the framework was established only for small deformations.
  The aim of the present paper is to discuss the fundamentals of the elasticity theory of finite deformation in cases where individual dislocations are present in the system. The equilibrium equations are derived within a variational formalism. It is shown that introducing dislocations into the finite deformation framework is a nontrivial task. Moreover, if the deformation is large, the force acting on a dislocation segment is not the well-known Peach-Koehler force. In a forthcoming paper, the results obtained will be applied to the generalisation of the dislocation continuum theory of curved dislocations.

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了大变形（有限变形）弹性理论中引入单个位错的基本问题，通过变分形式推导了平衡方程，并指出在大变形情况下作用在位错段上的力并非经典的Peach-Koehler力。
AI.motivation: 先前提出的弯曲位错连续介质理论仅适用于小变形，本文旨在将其推广至有限变形框架，为大变形下位错行为的理论描述奠定基础。
AI.method: 采用变分形式（variational formalism）推导有限变形弹性理论中的平衡方程，分析引入单个位错时的理论困难。
AI.result: 在大变形框架下引入位错并非易事；此外，当变形较大时，作用在位错段上的力不再是经典的Peach-Koehler力。
AI.conclusion: 本文结果为后续将弯曲位错连续介质理论推广至有限变形提供了理论基础，相关应用将在后续论文中呈现。

title: Antiferromagnetic Quantum Criticality in Infinite-Layer Cuprates Sr1-xNdxCuO2
summary: The interplay between quantum criticality and Fermi surface reconstruction is central to elucidating the phase diagram of high-temperature cuprate superconductors. While studies on electron-doped T'-structure cuprates suggest an antiferromagnetic origin of this reconstruction, quantitative consensus has been hindered by apical oxygen instabilities and uncontrolled oxygen vacancies. Here, we overcome these limitations by utilizing ozone-assisted molecular beam epitaxy to synthesize high-quality, oxygen-stoichiometric thin films of infinite-layer cuprate Sr1-xNdxCuO2 across its entire superconducting dome. Hall transport measurements reveal a sharp carrier-type transition signaling a Fermi surface reconstruction at a critical doping xc ~ 0.155. We show that a spin-density-wave tight-binding model quantitatively reproduces the transport evolution, supporting an antiferromagnetic origin of this quantum phase transition. Furthermore, upon suppressing superconductivity with magnetic fields, the normal-state resistivity exhibits a pristine strange metal behavior that persists down to 2 K in the vicinity of xc. Our findings establish an intrinsic, universal antiferromagnetic quantum criticality in electron-doped cuprates, positioning the structurally simplest infinite-layer cuprates as a clean benchmark platform for theories of unconventional superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文利用臭氧辅助分子束外延技术合成了高质量、氧化学计量比精确的无限层铜氧化物 Sr1-xNdxCuO2 薄膜，通过霍尔输运测量发现 xc~0.155 处存在费米面重构的载流子类型突变，并用量子临界涨落和自旋密度波紧束缚模型解释了该量子相变的反铁磁起源，确立了电子掺杂铜氧化物中内在、普适的反铁磁量子临界性。
AI.motivation: 量子临界性与费米面重构的相互作用对于理解高温铜氧化物超导体的相图至关重要，但电子掺杂 T' 结构铜氧化物的研究因顶氧不稳定性和无法控制的氧空位而缺乏定量共识，亟需克服这些材料合成上的障碍。
AI.method: 采用臭氧辅助分子束外延技术合成高质量、氧化学计量比精确的无限层铜酸盐 Sr1-xNdxCuO2 薄膜；通过霍尔输运测量表征载流子类型；利用自旋密度波紧束缚模型定量拟合输运演化数据；施加磁场抑制超导以观测正常态电阻率行为。
AI.result: 在临界掺杂 xc~0.155 处观察到载流子类型突变的费米面重构信号；自旋密度波紧束缚模型能定量复现输运演化；在 xc 附近，正常态电阻率展现出直至 2K 仍保持的奇异金属行为。
AI.conclusion: 本工作在结构最简单的无限层铜氧化物中确立了电子掺杂铜氧化物中内在、普适的反铁磁量子临界性，为超导理论提供了一个干净的基准平台。

title: Theory of frozen flux in a narrow uniform superconducting strip after cooling in a small magnetic field
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, Subm. Phys. Rev. B
summary: We analyze residual frozen flux in a long narrow superconducting strip cooled through its transition temperature $T_{c}$ in a small perpendicular magnetic field. This problem is relevant for the issue of trapped magnetic flux in superconducting electronic devices. During cooling, the low-temperature vortex configuration is formed at temperatures very close to $T_{c}$, where the flux density is determined by dynamic balance between the thermally-activated exits and entries of vortices over the geometrical energy barrier formed by the interaction with the strip edges and the Meissner screening current. In the field range between the minimum flux-expulsion field and the penetration field, the equilibrium flux density is finite due to thermal activation and rapidly decreases with decreasing temperature. During cooling, however, the escape rate decreases exponentially, and the vortex density falls out of equilibrium at a field-dependent freezing temperature $T_{\mathrm{fr}}$. We derive and solve the dynamic-balance equation for this process, which yields definite quantitative results for $T_{\mathrm{fr}}$ and the frozen vortex density. The relative freezing temperature $1\!-\!T_{\mathrm{fr}}/T_{c}$ exceeds the fluctuation width of the transition by a large logarithmic factor, rapidly increases when the magnetic field approaches the minimum flux-expulsion field, and logarithmically increases with decreasing cooling rate. The resulting frozen flux density has a very strong magnetic-field dependence which can be used to define the effective flux-expulsion magnetic field.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了超导窄带在垂直磁场中冷却至Tc以下时残留冻结磁通的形成机制，建立了热激活涡旋动态平衡模型，推导了冻结温度Tfr和冻结涡旋密度的定量结果，发现相对冻结温度1-Tfr/Tc随磁场接近最小排出场而迅速增大，并随冷却速率减小而对数增大。
AI.motivation: 解决超导电子器件中残留冻结磁通问题，理解窄超导条在冷却过程中涡旋的冻结行为及其对器件性能的影响。
AI.method: 建立涡旋热激活进出势垒的动态平衡方程，考虑几何能量势垒（边缘相互作用和迈斯纳屏蔽电流），推导冻结温度Tfr和冻结涡旋密度的定量表达式。
AI.result: 1) 平衡通量密度在最小排出场和穿透场之间因热激活而有限，并随温度降低迅速减小；2) 涡旋逃逸率指数下降，导致涡旋密度在冻结温度Tfr处脱离平衡；3) 相对冻结温度1-Tfr/Tc超过转变涨落宽度一个大对数因子，在磁场接近最小排出场时迅速增加，随冷却速率减小而对数增加；4) 冻结通量密度具有很强的磁场依赖性，可用于定义有效排出磁场。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了窄超导带中残留冻结磁通的形成机制，为超导电子器件中磁通陷阱问题的控制和优化提供了理论基础。

title: Tunable Rashba Splitting in Janus InXPbP (X = S, Se, Te) Monolayers for Enhanced Photocatalytic Water Splitting
summary: Janus two-dimensional (2D) materials exhibiting Rashba spin splitting have recently attracted considerable attention owing to their potential applications in spintronic devices and photocatalytic water splitting. In this work, we investigate, using first-principles calculations, the structural, mechanical, electronic, optical, and photocatalytic properties of Janus InXPbP (X = S, Se, Te) monolayers that exhibit significant Rashba effects. Our results demonstrate that all three monolayers are energetically, dynamically, and mechanically stable, as evidenced by cohesive energy calculations, phonon dispersion analysis, and elastic constants. By varying the chalcogen atom (X = S, Se, Te), the Rashba effect in InXPbP can be effectively tuned. Rashba parameters of 0.16 and 0.20 eVÅ are obtained near the conduction-band minimum (CBM) for InSPbP and InSePbP, respectively, whereas InTePbP exhibits giant Rashba spin splitting near both the CBM and valence-band maximum (VBM), with corresponding Rashba parameters of 0.90 and 0.87 eVÅ. Furthermore, the Janus InXPbP monolayers exhibit suitable band gaps of 1.21, 1.27, and 0.76 eV for InSPbP, InSePbP, and InTePbP, respectively, which are favorable for photocatalytic applications. All three monolayers possess suitable band-edge alignments for overall water splitting, yielding solar-to-hydrogen (STH) conversion efficiencies of 21.67%, 26.03%, and 29.83% for InSPbP, InSePbP, and InTePbP, respectively. Our findings not only enrich the family of Janus materials but also suggest that the Janus InXPbP monolayers are promising candidates for spintronic devices and high-performance photocatalytic water-splitting applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了Janus InXPbP (X = S, Se, Te)单层材料的结构、力学、电子、光学和光催化性能，发现其具有显著的Rashba自旋劈裂效应和优异的光催化水分解性能，太阳能到氢能的转换效率可达21%-30%。
AI.motivation: 探索具有Rashba自旋劈裂效应的Janus二维材料在自旋电子器件和光催化水分解中的潜在应用，并通过改变硫族原子(X = S, Se, Te)来调控Rashba效应。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，对Janus InXPbP单层的结构稳定性、力学性能、电子结构、光学性质和光催化特性进行系统研究。
AI.result: 三种单层均稳定；InTePbP在导带底和价带顶均表现出巨Rashba自旋劈裂（参数0.90和0.87 eVÅ）；带隙分别为1.21、1.27和0.76 eV；STH效率为21.67%-29.83%。
AI.conclusion: Janus InXPbP单层材料是自旋电子器件和高性能光催化水分解应用的有前景候选材料，丰富了Janus材料家族。

title: Bulk and surface excitons in the van der Waals magnet CrSBr: Magneto-optical studies to 55 tesla
summary: In thin layers of the 2D magnetic semiconductor CrSBr, very recent studies identified two distinct band-edge optical resonances, believed to arise from distinguishable bulk and surface excitons. This behavior reportedly originates from the highly anisotropic nature of CrSBr -- particularly in its antiferromagnetic state -- where excitons are effectively confined within individual monolayers, such that excitons in the two surface layers "see" a different local dielectric environment and have a lower resonance energy. To explore this scenario, here we investigate optical absorption properties of few-layer CrSBr in magnetic fields. In addition to the fundamental exciton resonance at ~1.36eV, we observe an absorption resonance ~20 meV lower in energy. Compared to the fundamental transition, this resonance redshifts only half as much in small magnetic fields that induce ferromagnetic order, while in high fields to 55T it exhibits a smaller diamagnetic shift. Both behaviors point to distinguishable populations of bulk and surface excitons in CrSBr.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过磁光吸收光谱证实了CrSBr二维磁性半导体中存在两种不同的激子共振：体激子和表面激子，两者在磁场响应上表现出显著差异。
AI.motivation: 近期研究发现CrSBr薄层中存在两种不同的带边光学共振，被认为来源于体激子和表面激子，但这一解释缺乏直接实验证据。本研究旨在通过磁光吸收测量验证这一假设。
AI.method: 测量少层CrSBr在磁场中的光学吸收特性，分析两个吸收共振峰（~1.36eV主峰和低20meV的次峰）在不同磁场强度下的能量移动行为。
AI.result: 1）观察到两个吸收共振峰，能量差约20meV；2）低能共振在诱导铁磁序的小磁场中红移幅度仅为主峰的一半；3）在高达55T的强磁场中，低能共振表现出更小的抗磁位移。
AI.conclusion: 两个共振峰对磁场的不同响应明确表明CrSBr中存在可区分的体激子和表面激子群体。

title: SLUSCHI-UP: A Web Infrastructure for SLUSCHI Melting-Temperature Calculations Using Universal Machine-Learning Interatomic Potentials
summary: Melting temperature is a critical property for high-temperature materials design, but first-principles melting calculations based on finite-temperature molecular dynamics can require substantial computational resources. The SLUSCHI method reduces this cost by using small-cell solid--liquid coexistence simulations and statistical analysis of many short molecular-dynamics trajectories. Here I present SLUSCHI-UP, a deployed web service for atomistic melting-temperature estimation that couples the SLUSCHI workflow to selectable pretrained universal machine-learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs) and asynchronous GPU execution. Users submit a crystal structure through a Materials Project identifier or POSCAR input, select a uMLIP backend, and launch a queued melting calculation without local installation of simulation software. The current production interface supports mace-mpa-0-medium, Allegro-OAM-L, and DPA-3.2-5M-OMat24, while beta deployments expose additional models. On the compact MeltBench-10 validation set, the three production backends produce raw coexistence mean absolute errors in the range of approximately 178--327 K. Across the broader set of materials tested so far in MeltBench, the current deployed-job snapshot contains 119 raw uMLIP entries, and PBE-corrected Allegro-OAM-L predictions reach a mean absolute error of approximately 166 K. These values should be interpreted as screening-level infrastructure validation rather than a definitive ranking of uMLIPs. The results demonstrate that SLUSCHI-UP provides a practical, provenance-aware deployment layer between fast scalar melting-temperature predictors and much more expensive first-principles coexistence calculations, while retaining the usual limitations of uMLIP transferability, finite-size sampling, and high-temperature trajectory stability.

AI.tldr: SLUSCHI-UP是一个部署在Web上的熔融温度估算服务，它将SLUSCHI小单元固液共存模拟方法与预训练的通用机器学习原子间势能（uMLIP）结合，支持异步GPU执行。用户可通过Materials Project标识符或POSCAR输入提交晶体结构，选择uMLIP后端，无需本地安装即可启动计算。在MeltBench-10验证集上，三种生产后端的原始共存平均绝对误差约为178-327 K，PBE校正后的Allegro-OAM-L预测平均绝对误差约为166 K。
AI.motivation: 高温材料设计中熔融温度是关键属性，但基于第一性原理有限温度分子动力学的熔融计算需要大量计算资源。SLUSCHI方法通过小单元固液共存模拟和短分子动力学轨迹的统计分析降低了成本，但用户仍需具备本地仿真软件安装和运行能力。
AI.method: SLUSCHI-UP将SLUSCHI工作流与可选择的预训练通用机器学习原子间势能（uMLIP，包括mace-mpa-0-medium、Allegro-OAM-L、DPA-3.2-5M-OMat24）以及异步GPU执行相结合，构建为Web服务。用户通过Materials Project标识符或POSCAR输入提交晶体结构，选择uMLIP后端，即可启动排队的熔融计算任务，无需本地安装。
AI.result: 在MeltBench-10验证集上，三个生产后端原始共存平均绝对误差约178-327 K；在更广泛的MeltBench测试材料中，当前部署任务快照包含119条原始uMLIP条目，PBE校正后的Allegro-OAM-L预测平均绝对误差约166 K。
AI.conclusion: SLUSCHI-UP提供了介于快速标量熔融温度预测器和更昂贵的第一性原理共存计算之间的实用、可追溯的部署层，但保留了uMLIP可迁移性、有限尺寸采样和高温轨迹稳定性等固有的局限性。

title: Coherent State Path Integral Monte Carlo
summary: We propose a new quantum simulation method for a many body quantum liquid of identical particles at finite (non-zero) temperature. The new scheme expands the high temperature density matrix on the overcomplete set of single particles coherent states of John Rider Klauder instead of the usual plane waves as in conventional path integral methods. One is free to tune the elastic constant and/or the mass of the harmonic oscillator subtending the coherent states so as to maximize the computational efficiency of the algorithm. We prove that in the limit of an extremely stiff harmonic oscillator the results for the internal energy tends towards the correct expected values. Moreover we suggest that a stiff harmonic oscillator could allow the use of larger (imaginary) timesteps. This additional degree of freedom is the characteristic feature of our new algorithm and is not available in more conventional path integral methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于John Rider Klauder相干态（而非平面波）的量子液体有限温度模拟新方法，通过调节谐振子参数（弹性常数/质量）提升计算效率，证明刚性极限下内能收敛于正确值，且刚性振子可使用更大虚时间步长。
AI.motivation: 传统路径积分方法使用平面波作为基矢，缺乏可调自由度，计算效率受限。本文旨在引入相干态基矢，通过调节谐振子参数获得额外自由度，从而优化量子液体有限温度模拟的计算效率。
AI.method: 用John Rider Klauder单粒子相干态（过完备基）替换传统平面波，构建高温密度矩阵展开方案；通过调节谐振子的弹性常数和/或质量来优化算法性能；在刚性振子极限下证明内能趋于正确值。
AI.result: 证明了在极端刚性谐振子极限下，内能计算结果趋近于正确期望值；提出了刚性振子可能允许使用更大的虚时间步长（提高计算效率）。
AI.conclusion: 该相干态路径积分方法通过可调谐振子参数提供了传统方法不具备的额外自由度，有望在保持精度的同时提升量子液体有限温度模拟的计算效率。

title: Autonomous heterogeneous catalyst discovery with a self-evolving multi-agent digital twin
summary: Theoretical heterogeneous catalysis promises rapid catalyst discovery, yet computational and machine-learning predictions often deviate from experiment and stay confined to narrow material families, for want of a faithful, condition-aware catalytic simulator. We present CatDT (Catalysis Digital Twin), a self-evolving multi-agent system that builds an autonomous digital twin of a working catalyst, unifying gas-solid and liquid-solid modeling. From only a bulk crystal and a natural-language reaction description, eight specialized agents and 27 scientific tools predict stable facets, reconstruct working surfaces, enumerate and rank reaction pathways, locate transition states, and compute kinetics in 5-30 min on a single GPU. Two innovations address the hardest steps: UniMech finds dominant pathways for novel materials at over $10^3\times$ lower cost than exhaustive enumeration by fusing agent-guided proposals with energy-cached graph search, and a memory-augmented reinforcement loop raises barrier-calculation success from 41\% to 84\% across 600 catalytic surfaces. Across seven gas-solid benchmarks -- stepped metals, single-atom catalysts, ordered intermetallics, vacancy-rich 2D sulfides and carbides, and a strong-metal--support-interaction (SMSI) interface -- every CatDT prediction lies within 0.5-2 times experiment over four orders of magnitude. For propane dehydrogenation, CatDT independently discovers non-precious candidates rivaling the Pt-based industrial benchmark, with a proposed Ni@ZrO$_2$ SMSI overlayer reaching a simulated TOF of $1.63~\text{s}^{-1}$ at $\sim$100\% selectivity. More broadly, the decisive factor for a faithful catalyst digital twin -- or any multi-stage scientific simulator -- is not raw LLM capability but the engineered harness around it: deterministic tools, persistent memory, and verified self-improvement that compound across models, tools, and runs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CatDT（催化数字孪生），一个自进化多智能体系统，从体相晶体和自然语言反应描述出发，在单GPU上5-30分钟内自动构建工作催化剂的数字孪生体，涵盖从表面重构到反应动力学的完整流程。通过UniMech路径发现算法和记忆增强强化循环两大创新，在600个催化表面上将过渡态计算成功率从41%提升至84%，在七个气固多相催化基准上的预测与实验偏差在0.5-2倍以内，并自主发现了媲美工业Pt基准的非贵金属丙烷脱氢催化剂。
AI.motivation: 理论多相催化有望实现快速催化剂发现，但计算和机器学习预测常偏离实验，且局限于狭窄的材料家族，根源在于缺乏忠实、考虑工况条件的催化模拟器。
AI.method: CatDT系统包含八个专门智能体和27种科学工具。两大核心创新：(1) UniMech——融合智能体引导探索与能量缓存图搜索，以比穷举法低三个数量级的成本发现新材料主导反应路径；(2) 记忆增强强化循环——将过渡态计算成功率从41%提升至84%。系统从体相晶体和自然语言反应描述出发，依次完成稳定晶面预测、工作表面重构、反应路径枚举排序、过渡态定位和动力学计算。
AI.result: 在七个气固多相催化基准（阶梯金属、单原子催化剂、有序金属间化合物、富空位二维硫化物和碳化物、强金属-载体相互作用界面）上，CatDT所有预测在四个数量级范围内与实验偏差在0.5-2倍以内。丙烷脱氢任务中，CatDT自主发现非贵金属候选催化剂，提出Ni@ZrO₂ SMSI覆盖层，模拟TOF达1.63 s⁻¹，选择性~100%。
AI.conclusion: 实现忠实催化剂数字孪生（或任何多阶段科学模拟器）的决定性因素不是原始LLM能力，而是围绕LLM设计的工程架构：确定性工具、持久记忆和可验证的自我改进，这些能力在模型、工具和运行之间复合放大。
